services.title: web platform
services.description: full-stack web platforms on next.js — marketing, content, commerce, and product applications.

services.title: ui engineering
services.description: figma to production — component systems, interaction, and motion.

services.title: embedded role
services.description: principal-level frontend, embedded with your team — where engineering rigor and design quality meet.

services.title: technical review
services.description: short-term or ongoing — architecture, systems, and product direction.

projects.title: bankroll.fyi
projects.description: bankroll management for poker players and sports bettors. log sessions in natural language, track variance and roi across games, and see where your money actually comes from.

projects.title: Legend.xyz
projects.description: marketing site for an embedded smart contract wallet built on open defi protocols. custom webgl moments, scroll-driven sequences, a technical product rendered for a non-technical audience.

projects.title: Amazon: The Bar
projects.description: site for a creative agency that builds for amazon. custom animation, editorial layouts, typography that carries the brand. nothing off the shelf.

projects.title: One/Of
projects.description: e-commerce for a made-to-order fashion label. custom booking flow for in-person fittings, headless shopify checkout for ready-to-ship pieces. two purchase models, one interface.

projects.title: Modern Treasury
projects.description: ui and component work for a fintech platform processing over a billion dollars in payments annually. marketing surfaces and in-app patterns built against a shared design system.

projects.title: elara.world
projects.description: community platform pairing editorial content with a merchandise store. publishing and commerce running on the same frontend, same design language, no seams.

projects.title: Revolve Law
projects.description: site for a law firm that wanted to look like neither a law firm nor a tech company. restrained type, quiet motion, a contact flow that gets people to the right place in two clicks.

projects.title: Kelvon Agee
projects.description: portfolio for a photographer. full-bleed imagery, ruthless image optimization, typography kept out of the way. the work is the interface.

projects.title: The Well
projects.description: wellness platform combining e-commerce, appointment booking, and member access. shopify for products, custom scheduling for services, member state shared across all of it.

projects.title: El Dorado
projects.description: architecture studio portfolio. project pages built around process — drawings, material studies, site photography — not just finished shots. the site reads like a monograph.

projects.title: VICE
projects.description: editorial platform serving millions of readers. real-time content delivery, ad integration, and a frontend that had to hold up under breaking-news traffic spikes.
